title: PERFORMANCE BASELINE
description: Performance Baseline is a lightweight, optimized modpack for creators. It boosts FPS, reduces lag, and improves stability without changing vanilla gameplay.
body:
Performance Baseline

Performance Baseline is a lightweight, highly optimized modpack designed to serve as a foundation for modpack creators. It provides essential performance improvements, stability enhancements, and optimization tweaks without altering vanilla gameplay.

🔹 Why Use Performance Baseline?

✅ Optimized Performance – Boost FPS, reduce lag, and improve tick times.
✅ Stable & Efficient – Smart memory management and chunk loading optimizations.
✅ Vanilla-Friendly – No gameplay changes, ensuring full compatibility.
✅ Modpack-Ready – Acts as a baseline for creators to build on top of.
✅ Plug & Play – Works out of the box, with minimal setup required.

Whether you’re making an adventure modpack, a tech-heavy experience, or a lightweight vanilla-plus pack, Performance Baseline gives you a rock-solid starting point. 🚀

Let me know if you’d like any changes!
